1_clean_state.description: State was already clean from previous tests

2_task_dependencies.description: Created tasks with execution ordering dependencies using batch creation
2_task_dependencies.expected: Dependent task has dependencies array with prerequisite task ID
2_task_dependencies.actual: Task 'Dependent Task' has dependencies array containing 'prerequisite-task' ID. Used for workflow execution DAG scheduling

3_parent_child_relationships.description: Created hierarchical task organization using batch creation with positional references
3_parent_child_relationships.expected: Subtasks have parentTaskId pointing to parent task, get_subtasks returns both subtasks
3_parent_child_relationships.actual: Subtasks have parentTaskId pointing to 'parent-task'. get_subtasks returned both subtasks (subtask-1, subtask-2) under parent

4_promoting_thoughts_to_tasks.description: Converted reasoning thoughts into executable tasks using promote_thought_to_tasks
4_promoting_thoughts_to_tasks.expected: Task created with cognitive metadata (sourceThoughtId, sourceTreeId, promotedAt, syncStatus)
4_promoting_thoughts_to_tasks.actual: Task 'FeatureApproach to implement feature' created with cognitive metadata: sourceThoughtId: 'approach-to-implement-feature', sourceTreeId: 'test-thought-promotion', promotedAt: timestamp, syncStatus: 'synced'

5_spawning_thoughts_from_tasks.description: Created reasoning trees from blocked tasks using spawn_tot_from_task
5_spawning_thoughts_from_tasks.expected: New tree created, task updated with explorationTreeIds and spawnedAt, tree metadata includes sourceTaskId
5_spawning_thoughts_from_tasks.actual: Tree 'explore-approaches-to-solve-the-blocked-task' created. Task updated with explorationTreeIds: ['explore-approaches-to-solve-the-blocked-task'], spawnedAt: timestamp, provenanceChain. Tree metadata includes sourceTaskId: 'blocked-task-for-reasoning'

6_sync_status_management.description: Tested initial link creation with link_thought_to_task
6_sync_status_management.expected: Sync status transitions work correctly (synced → outdated → conflict → synced)
6_sync_status_management.actual: Initial link created successfully. Sync status management transitions not fully tested (requires manual updates to trigger state changes)

7_verify_persistence.description: Waited 2 seconds for debounced save, verified thoughtflow-state.json
7_verify_persistence.actual: Task dependencies persisted in dependencies arrays. Parent-child relationships persisted in parentTaskId fields. Promotion metadata persisted in task cognitive metadata. Spawning metadata persisted in task and tree cognitive metadata. Cognitive links created

key_findings.task_dependencies: WORKING - Dependencies array correctly stores prerequisite task IDs
key_findings.parent_child_relationships: WORKING - parentTaskId correctly stores parent task, get_subtasks retrieves subtasks
key_findings.thought_promotion: WORKING - promote_thought_to_tasks creates tasks with full cognitive metadata
key_findings.task_spawning: WORKING - spawn_tot_from_task creates trees with source tracking and provenance chain
key_findings.cognitive_links: WORKING - link_thought_to_task creates bidirectional cognitive links
key_findings.sync_status: PARTIALLY_TESTED - Initial link creation works, full transition cycle requires manual testing
